title: Taste signals
description: The raw preference evidence — one user action on a listing. Saves, dismisses (with reasons), and contacts are what the ranker learns from.

searchId.description: the search the signal belongs to

listingId.description: the listing acted on (kept when the listing row is merged/removed)

reason.description: the user's stated why ('kitchen too dark', 'love the balcony') — the highest-value learning input

folded.description: whether the ranker has folded this signal into taste_notes yet (the learn action's self-scan cursor)
